extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer is claiming the car's windshield is shattered due to a stone impact.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows multiple impact points and radiating cracks on a car's windshield.
The image shows the interior of a car looking out through the windshield, but no damage is visible on the windshield itself.

result.user_claim: Customer: A stone hit the front glass while driving. | Support: Are you reporting the windshield? | Customer: Yes. It looks shattered from my side. | Support: Any other part involved? | Customer: No, only the windshield shatter claim.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed windshield with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed windshield with visible glass_shatter. Supporting images: img_1.
